questions.question: What are the setback requirements from wetland boundaries?
questions.answer: The discovered source indicates a setback of 150 feet from a wetland for tree removal permit purposes. It also states that any tree within any wetland requires a permit. No additional wetland boundary setback is specified in the statute excerpts provided.
vectorResearchSuggestions: Lewisboro Tree Preservation Ordinance wetland setback
wetland protection ordinance setback from wetland boundary
